subject: [PATCH v5 3/3] cxl/core: use cleanup.h for devm_cxl_add_dax_region

reviews.author: Ira Weiny
reviews.summary: Ira reviewed the patch and gave it a Reviewed-by tag without any specific comments or suggestions.
reviews.raw_body:

> Cleanup the gotos in the function.  No functional change.

2026-03-27.patch_summary: This patch series cleans up the cxl core code by using cleanup.h for devm_cxl_add_dax_region, which is a step towards improving the code's maintainability and reducing technical debt.
